prompt:
A hydroponic tub setup ready for planting: an opaque reservoir with a clean lid, airline tubing and airstone gently bubbling, and a balanced nutrient solution visible in a small inspection window or open corner. A net-pot raft or insert is staged nearby, along with rinsed seedlings (no identifiable brands), making it clear the system is prepared for leafy greens.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a grounded near-future solarpunk grow-lab style: soft cinematic lighting, clean plastics, subtle condensation, no logos, and no readable text. Keep the tub centered and the scene simple so it reads as “ready-to-use hydroponics reservoir.”
